scripts.test: node -e "console.log('Starting test server...'); const http = require('http'); const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const server = http.createServer((req, res) => { const filePath = req.url === '/' ? 'test.html' : req.url.slice(1); const ext = path.extname(filePath); const contentType = ext === '.js' ? 'text/javascript' : ext === '.css' ? 'text/css' : 'text/html'; try { const content = fs.readFileSync(filePath); res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': contentType }); res.end(content); } catch { res.writeHead(404); res.end('Not found'); } }); server.listen(8080, () => console.log('Test server running at http://localhost:8080')); "
